/Users/ombhardwaj/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.0.12674087/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/Users/ombhardwaj/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.0.12674087/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments   -Wl,--gc-sections  -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/djpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/cdjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdcolmap-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdcolmap-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/rdswitch.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrbmp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrgif-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrgif-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrppm-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrppm-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/wrppm-16.c.o" "CMakeFiles/djpeg-static.dir/src/wrtarga.c.o" -o djpeg-static  libjpeg.a -latomic -lm
